name: GTS Virus
description:
You're sitting in the middle of math class, and then a new virus emerges that causes females to grow about 50 feet tall. And one of your classmates has it, so good luck not getting it.

[Giantess, Giant, Growth and Growing]

(Everyone is over age of 18)

(Got this idea from a form.)

Art by inksGirls
creator: bobibone
